title: Kangan
writer: Saradindu Bandopadhyay, Gajendra Kumar Mitra, S. Mukherjee
actors: Leela Chitnis, Ashok Kumar, V.H. Desai
plot: The love story between between the beautiful village belle Radha and Kamal, the son of the village zamindar who wants to be a great poet. The zamindar sends his son to the city where Kamal becomes a noted novelist and playwright w...
